## Reviewer Checklist
- [ ] Business requirements were verified against the issue and acceptance criteria
- [ ] Architecture was checked against `.github/instructions/architecture.md`
- [ ] Review severity was applied using `.github/instructions/review-standard.md`
- [ ] Layering, dependency direction, and Domain Model / DTO separation are correct
- [ ] Merge recommendation is clear
